title: WhiteHat Jr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: WhiteHat Jr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
WhiteHat Jr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
